# Obligatory Mermaid Architecture Documentation Guideline

When architecture documentation changes, include Mermaid diagrams.

## Minimum required diagrams

1. High-level system context diagram.
2. Component/module interaction diagram.
3. Runtime flow diagram for key path(s).

## Rules

1. Keep node names aligned with real package/module/service names.
2. Update diagrams whenever architecture-relevant code changes.
3. Prefer: `flowchart`, `sequenceDiagram`, `classDiagram`, `graph TD`, `graph LR`.
